name: weekly-digest
description: Sunday 6pm synthesis. Reads the week's notes, identifies themes, generates cross-domain insights, updates synthesis hub.
prompt: Run vault-digest. Read all notes from past 7 days. Identify themes. Generate 3-7 cross-domain insights. Surface contradictions and tensions. Write digest to wiki/journal/sync-logs/YYYY-MM-DD-digest.md. Update wiki/synthesis/00-synthesis-engine-hub.md with new insights. Deliver chat summary.
